meta.poznamky: Smyčka má 1 opakování (špatně), student musí změnit na 4.

cms.task_text: Kód kreslí čtverec, ale smyčka [hlp]opakuje jen jednou[/hlp]. Opravte počet opakování na správnou hodnotu.
cms.start_blocks_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">1</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
cms.spravna_odpoved_xml: <xml xmlns="https://developers.google.com/blockly/xml"><block type="controls_repeat_ext" x="50" y="50"><value name="TIMES"><shadow type="math_number"><field name="NUM">4</field></shadow></value><statement name="DO"><block type="turtle_forward"><field name="DISTANCE">80</field><next><block type="turtle_right"><field name="ANGLE">90</field></block></next></block></statement></block></xml>
